text.title: Pricing Experiment Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 pinning the shape of {experiment_plan, stripe_preflight, decision_memo}. Validator enforces this contract before launch and at end_date.

example.code: { "plan": { "experiment_id": "exp-2026-q2-pricing", "start_date": "2026-06-01", "end_date": "2026-07-30", "duration_days": 60, "variant_old": {"stripe_price_id": "price_old_19"}, "variant_new": {"stripe_price_id": "price_new_29"}, "audience": "new_signups_only", "exposure_rule": "random 50/50 by signup-id hash mod 2", "success_metric_primary": "trial_to_paid_conversion_pct", "success_metric_threshold": 0.18, "significance_target": "p<0.05", "guardrail_metrics": ["refund_rate", "dispute_rate", "support_ticket_rate"], "grandfathering": { "audience": "all subs active before 2026-06-01", "mechanism": "100% off coupon on new Price", "stripe_coupon_id": "grandfather_q2_2026", "window_months": 12 }, "currencies_in_test": ["usd"], "tax_behavior": "exclusive" }, "stripe_preflight": { "passed_at": "2026-05-28T09:00:00Z", "checks_run": ["new_price_exists", "old_price_active", "coupon_attached", "no_orphan_subs"] }, "decision_memo": { "written_at": "2026-07-31T18:00:00Z", "decision": "adopt_new", "metric_readouts": {"trial_to_paid_new": 0.21, "trial_to_paid_old": 0.17}, "qualitative_signals": "no refund spike, 2 dispute tickets (baseline)", "next_action": "Move all new signups to price_new_29 on 2026-08-01." } }

example.note: experiment_id too short, duration_days exceeds 90, tax_behavior not in enum, checks_run empty, decision_memo missing required fields.

forbidden.pattern: plan.start_date later than stripe_preflight.passed_at (going live without verification).
Grandfathering applied via "we will just not bill them yet" with no Stripe coupon or separate Price.
Old Stripe Price object archived or deleted (must remain active for grandfathered subs).
Multi-currency experiment without a separate Price per currency.
decision_memo.decision = extend_with_adjustment for the third extension in a row.
stripe_preflight.passed_at missing OR more than 7 days before plan.start_date.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Pause the experiment mid-window (new-signup routing reverts) when a guardrail is approached but not breached.
Localise customer announcement copy per currency-region; keep substance identical.
Round MRR delta to nearest $50 in the memo display; keep raw precision in readouts.
